topic.what: C2PA provenance verification system for digital media
topic.how: first comprehensive independent security analysis including formal-methods analysis of C2PA core protocols, testing of real-world implementations and conformance program
topic.why_matters: C2PA is being adopted for high-stakes applications like journalism, legal evidence, and financial disclosures despite failing its own security claims, risking premature trust in unreliable provenance signals

characteristics.what_it_measures: Coverage of C2PA specification versions analyzed
characteristics.context: Multiple specification versions analyzed for vulnerabilities

characteristics.what_it_measures: Agreement between different C2PA validation tools
characteristics.evidence: Adobe Inspect and Verifieddit give contradictory results on same revoked certificate
characteristics.context: Nikon Z6 III camera certificate revoked November 2025, validated by Adobe but rejected by Verifieddit 6+ months later

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether conforming validators check for revoked certificates
characteristics.context: Design flaw: revocation checking intentionally optional for privacy reasons

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether timestamps are cryptographically bound to signed content
characteristics.evidence: Formal-methods analysis found timestamps can be replaced without detection
characteristics.context: Nothing in signed data references the timestamp, allowing removal and replacement

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of file bytes protected by C2PA signatures
characteristics.evidence: Exclusion ranges allow portions of files to be modified without invalidating signatures
characteristics.context: Google Pixel 10 Pro places GPS in exclusion range; can be altered without detection

characteristics.what_it_measures: Time before C2PA-signed media becomes unverifiable
characteristics.evidence: Arizona Secretary of State C2PA pilot image expired within one year
characteristics.context: Incompatible with 52 U.S.C. § 20701 (22 months), 12 C.F.R. § 1002.12 (25 months), 47 C.F.R. § 73.3526 (2 years)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Whether certified products comply with specifications
characteristics.evidence: Certification based on self-reported compliance with no examination of functionality or source code
characteristics.context: Conforming products do not necessarily comply with specifications; complying with flawed specs does not satisfy security goals

novelty: first formal-methods analysis of C2PA core protocols
first comprehensive independent security analysis of C2PA
demonstration of timestamp forging without detection
exposure of validator inconsistency on revoked certificates
documentation of credential expiration failures in production deployments
open_problems: enabling strict certificate revocation checking with privacy preservation
securing timestamp binding to prevent replacement attacks
achieving validator consistency across different tools
protecting entire file including non-C2PA metadata
ensuring credential longevity for long-term archival needs
establishing independent security audits for certified products
clarifying C2PA limitations in public communications
integrating C2PA with reputation and fact-checking services
